entry.title: Abaikan Intruksi Anies, Kasatpol PP DKI Jakarta: Siapa Jagoan Disini, Keluar!

link.title: Abaikan Intruksi Anies, Kasatpol PP DKI Jakarta: Siapa Jagoan Disini, Keluar!

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPASTV - Abaikan Instruksi penutupan satu hari oleh Gubernur DKI Jakarta, Anies Baswedan Kasatpol PP DKI Jakarta, Arifin menyegel sebuah kedai kopi di kawasan Jakarta Selatan yang melanggar protokol kesehatan.
Dengan nada emosi, Arifin mengamuk dan langsung menegur pihak kedai kopi karena masih membandel.
Kedai kopi yang sebelumnya ditutup oleh Gubernur beberapa waktu lalu nekat dibuka kembali bahkan mereka tidak menerapkan protokol kesehatan dengan memberi batas jarak jumlah kursi dan kapasitas orang untuk masuk kedalam kedai tersebut.
Pihak Satpol PP sendiri mengancam akan menutup secara permanen kedai kopi tersebut.
Sementara itu, pasca disegel kembali oleh Satpol PP DKI Jakarta kedai kopi yang berada di Jalan Haji Nawi, Kebayoran Baru, Jakarta Selatan ini sabtu (5/9/2020) siang terlihat sepi.
Tidak ada aktifitas pelayanan di cafe tersebut, sejumlah bangku pun yang berada di kedai dalam keadaan terbalik.
Selain itu, kedai ini juga sudah dilakukan pemasangan garis Satpol PP DKI Jakarta disekeliling bangunan.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPASTV - Abaikan Instruksi penutupan satu hari oleh Gubernur DKI Jakarta, Anies Baswedan Kasatpol PP DKI Jakarta, Arifin menyegel sebuah kedai kopi di kawasan Jakarta Selatan yang melanggar protokol kesehatan. Dengan nada emosi, Arifin mengamuk dan langsung menegur pihak kedai kopi karena masih membandel. Kedai kopi yang sebelumnya ditutup oleh Gubernur beberapa waktu lalu nekat dibuka kembali bahkan mereka tidak menerapkan protokol kesehatan dengan memberi batas jarak jumlah kursi dan kapasitas orang untuk masuk kedalam kedai tersebut. Pihak Satpol PP sendiri mengancam akan menutup secara permanen kedai kopi tersebut. Sementara itu, pasca disegel kembali oleh Satpol PP DKI Jakarta kedai kopi yang berada di Jalan Haji Nawi, Kebayoran Baru, Jakarta Selatan ini sabtu (5/9/2020) siang terlihat sepi. Tidak ada aktifitas pelayanan di cafe tersebut, sejumlah bangku pun yang berada di kedai dalam keadaan terbalik. Selain itu, kedai ini juga sudah dilakukan pemasangan garis Satpol PP DKI Jakarta disekeliling bangunan.

entry.title: India-China tensions: India fully prepared, will retaliate say sources Oneindia News

link.title: India-China tensions: India fully prepared, will retaliate say sources Oneindia News

entry.content:
India will retaliate if its defences on heights are breached say govt sources; Delhi govt junks need for prescription for Covid test; Kangana warns Uddhav Thackeray, uses ‘tu’ to address him; Sharad Pawar says BMC action on Ranaut creates doubts; Rhea Chakraborty to spend night at jail, bail plea to be heard tomorrow; Donald Trump nominated for Nobel Peace Prize & more news
#Headlines #KanganaRanaut #NobelPeacePrize
entry.summary: India will retaliate if its defences on heights are breached say govt sources; Delhi govt junks need for prescription for Covid test; Kangana warns Uddhav Thackeray, uses ‘tu’ to address him; Sharad Pawar says BMC action on Ranaut creates doubts; Rhea Chakraborty to spend night at jail, bail plea to be heard tomorrow; Donald Trump nominated for Nobel Peace Prize & more news #Headlines #KanganaRanaut #NobelPeacePrize

entry.title: T Journalist Forum: కాళేశ్వరం ఒక్కటే వరప్రదాయిని కాదు, తెలంగాణ పెండింగ్‌ ప్రాజెక్టులుపై భేటీ !

link.title: T Journalist Forum: కాళేశ్వరం ఒక్కటే వరప్రదాయిని కాదు, తెలంగాణ పెండింగ్‌ ప్రాజెక్టులుపై భేటీ !

entry.content:
T Journalist Forum Conducts All Party Meeting On Pending Irrigation Projects in Telangana
#TelanganaPendingIrrigationProjects
#TJournalistForum
#AllPartyMeeting
#LiftIrrigationProjects
#KrishnaRiverProjects
#TRS
#CMKCR
#KasaniSrinivas
#JaiSwarajParty
#CongressRevanthreddy
# T -జర్నలిస్టు ఫోరం
T -జర్నలిస్టుల ఫోరమ్ ఆధ్వర్యంలో తెలంగాణ పెండింగ్ సాగు నీటి ప్రాజెక్టులపై అఖిల పక్ష సమావేశం జరిగింది. తెలంగాణలో సాగు నీటి ప్రాజెక్టులు వెంటనే పూర్తి చెయ్యాలని T -జర్నలిస్టుల ఫోరమ్ డిమాండ్ చేస్తోంది గురువారం టీ–జర్నలిస్టు ఫోరం ఆధ్వర్యంలో హైదరాబాద్‌ లోని ఓ హోటల్‌లో ‘కృష్ణా నది–తెలంగాణ పెండింగ్‌ ప్రాజెక్టులు’అనే అంశంపై అఖిలపక్ష భేటీ నిర్వహించారు.
entry.summary: T Journalist Forum Conducts All Party Meeting On Pending Irrigation Projects in Telangana #TelanganaPendingIrrigationProjects #TJournalistForum #AllPartyMeeting #LiftIrrigationProjects #KrishnaRiverProjects #TRS #CMKCR #KasaniSrinivas #JaiSwarajParty #CongressRevanthreddy # T -జర్నలిస్టు ఫోరం T -జర్నలిస్టుల ఫోరమ్ ఆధ్వర్యంలో తెలంగాణ పెండింగ్ సాగు నీటి ప్రాజెక్టులపై అఖిల పక్ష సమావేశం జరిగింది. తెలంగాణలో సాగు నీటి ప్రాజెక్టులు వెంటనే పూర్తి చెయ్యాలని T -జర్నలిస్టుల ఫోరమ్ డిమాండ్ చేస్తోంది గురువారం టీ–జర్నలిస్టు ఫోరం ఆధ్వర్యంలో హైదరాబాద్‌ లోని ఓ హోటల్‌లో ‘కృష్ణా నది–తెలంగాణ పెండింగ్‌ ప్రాజెక్టులు’అనే అంశంపై అఖిలపక్ష భేటీ నిర్వహించారు.

entry.title: Pemberton to be deported after Duterte pardon Evening wRap

link.title: Pemberton to be deported after Duterte pardon Evening wRap

entry.content:
Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world:
- Philippines to deport US soldier Pemberton after Duterte pardon. The Philippine government will deport US Marine Lance Corporal Joseph Scott Pemberton to the United States after being pardoned by President Rodrigo Duterte for brutally killing a Filipino transgender woman in 2014.
- DOH expects ‘irregularly high number of cases’ this week due to reporting delays. The Department of Health (DOH) said on Wednesday, September 9, that it anticipates an "irregularly high number" of COVID-19 cases in the country in the coming days due to reporting delays.
- Lorraine Badoy’s red-tagging causes suspension of PCOO 2021 budget hearing. Progressive lawmakers outraged by Presidential Communications Undersecretary Lorraine Badoy’s persistent red-tagging managed to suspend her entire agency’s 2021 budget hearing at the House of Representatives on Wednesday, September 9.
- Cimatu counters DOH: Dolomite in Manila Bay not harmful to health. Environment Secretary Roy Cimatu refuted claims by experts that dolomite dumped in Manila Bay will cause respiratory illnesses.
- FALSE: COVID-19 is a program for mass extermination, not a real disease. COVID-19 has been verified by the WHO as a naturally-occurring virus. No scientific evidence proves otherwise.
entry.summary: Today on Rappler – the latest news in the Philippines and around the world: - Philippines to deport US soldier Pemberton after Duterte pardon. The Philippine government will deport US Marine Lance Corporal Joseph Scott Pemberton to the United States after being pardoned by President Rodrigo Duterte for brutally killing a Filipino transgender woman in 2014. - DOH expects ‘irregularly high number of cases’ this week due to reporting delays. The Department of Health (DOH) said on Wednesday, September 9, that it anticipates an "irregularly high number" of COVID-19 cases in the country in the coming days due to reporting delays. - Lorraine Badoy’s red-tagging causes suspension of PCOO 2021 budget hearing. Progressive lawmakers outraged by Presidential Communications Undersecretary Lorraine Badoy’s persistent red-tagging managed to suspend her entire agency’s 2021 budget hearing at the House of Representatives on Wednesday, September 9. - Cimatu counters DOH: Dolomite in Manila Bay not harmful to health. Environment Secretary Roy Cimatu refuted claims by experts that dolomite dumped in Manila Bay will cause respiratory illnesses. - FALSE: COVID-19 is a program for mass extermination, not a real disease. COVID-19 has been verified by the WHO as a naturally-occurring virus. No scientific evidence proves otherwise.

entry.title: Marseille. Première rentrée scolaire pour Michèle Rubirola, nouvelle maire

link.title: Marseille. Première rentrée scolaire pour Michèle Rubirola, nouvelle maire

entry.content:
Ce matin, Michèle Rubirola a fait se première rentrée entant que nouvelle maire de Marseille aux côtés du recteur de l’Académie d’Aix-Marseille et de plusieurs adjoints. Le Covid était la grande préoccupation du jour mais à Marseille, il y a bien d’autres problématiques à régler au sein des écoles…
Le besoin de rénovation des bâtiments et de mise aux normes a pris une ampleur croissante ces dernières années. C’était d’ailleurs une des grandes priorités portée par la nouvelle majorité lors de la campagne municipale. L’objectif d’ici la fin du mandat est de "de remettre à niveau l’ensemble des établissements scolaires municipaux". La ville a annoncé investir 30 millions d’euros supplémentaires du budget municipal pour le bâti des écoles. Pour l’instant depuis un mois, les problèmes considérés comme les plus urgents ont été traités pour assurer une rentrée sécurisée des enfants. 
  …
Vidéo publiée le : 01/09/2020 à 11:48:00
Lien vers l’article de Maritima.info :
entry.summary: Ce matin, Michèle Rubirola a fait se première rentrée entant que nouvelle maire de Marseille aux côtés du recteur de l’Académie d’Aix-Marseille et de plusieurs adjoints. Le Covid était la grande préoccupation du jour mais à Marseille, il y a bien d’autres problématiques à régler au sein des écoles… Le besoin de rénovation des bâtiments et de mise aux normes a pris une ampleur croissante ces dernières années. C’était d’ailleurs une des grandes priorités portée par la nouvelle majorité lors de la campagne municipale. L’objectif d’ici la fin du mandat est de "de remettre à niveau l’ensemble des établissements scolaires municipaux". La ville a annoncé investir 30 millions d’euros supplémentaires du budget municipal pour le bâti des écoles. Pour l’instant depuis un mois, les problèmes considérés comme les plus urgents ont été traités pour assurer une rentrée sécurisée des enfants. … Vidéo publiée le : 01/09/2020 à 11:48:00 Lien vers l’article de Maritima.info :

entry.title: Mafia: Definitive Edition - Welcome to the City of Lost Heaven (2020)

link.title: Mafia: Definitive Edition - Welcome to the City of Lost Heaven (2020)

entry.content:
Lost Heaven is an authentic prohibition-era city that is riddled with corruption. Experience classic Mafia missions in this iconic city, completely rebuilt from the ground up.
Mafia: Definitive Edition releases September 25, 2020. Pre-order now separately or as part of the Mafia: Trilogy.
➜
Official website:
KEY FEATURES:
Re-made from the ground up, rise through the ranks of the Mafia during the Prohibition era of organized crime. After a run-in with the mob, cab driver Tommy Angelo is thrust into a deadly underworld. Initially uneasy about falling in with the Salieri crime family, Tommy soon finds that the rewards are too big to ignore.
Play a Mob Movie:
Live the life of a Prohibition-era gangster and rise through the ranks of the Mafia.
Lost Heaven, IL:
Recreated 1930’s cityscape, filled with interwar architecture, cars and culture to see, hear and interact with.
Re-Made Classic:
Faithfully recreated, with expanded story, gameplay and original score. This is the Mafia you remembered and much more.
Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤
—
Connect with us!
▸Support us:
▸Dailymotion:
▸Facebook:
▸Twitter:
▸Twitch:
▸Web:
entry.summary: Lost Heaven is an authentic prohibition-era city that is riddled with corruption. Experience classic Mafia missions in this iconic city, completely rebuilt from the ground up. Mafia: Definitive Edition releases September 25, 2020. Pre-order now separately or as part of the Mafia: Trilogy. ➜ Official website: KEY FEATURES: Re-made from the ground up, rise through the ranks of the Mafia during the Prohibition era of organized crime. After a run-in with the mob, cab driver Tommy Angelo is thrust into a deadly underworld. Initially uneasy about falling in with the Salieri crime family, Tommy soon finds that the rewards are too big to ignore. Play a Mob Movie: Live the life of a Prohibition-era gangster and rise through the ranks of the Mafia. Lost Heaven, IL: Recreated 1930’s cityscape, filled with interwar architecture, cars and culture to see, hear and interact with. Re-Made Classic: Faithfully recreated, with expanded story, gameplay and original score. This is the Mafia you remembered and much more. Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤ — Connect with us! ▸Support us: ▸Dailymotion: ▸Facebook: ▸Twitter: ▸Twitch: ▸Web:

entry.title: Paramotorist Takes A Dive

link.title: Paramotorist Takes A Dive

entry.content: Sometimes accidents happen, even to experienced paramotorists. The host of the YouTube channel [Paramotor Crazy]( found himself unintentionally taking a dip into a local river while he was out flying. Luckily, he wasn’t hurt, nothing was damaged, and he even managed to catch a fish in his parachute!
entry.summary: Sometimes accidents happen, even to experienced paramotorists. The host of the YouTube channel [Paramotor Crazy]( found himself unintentionally taking a dip into a local river while he was out flying. Luckily, he wasn’t hurt, nothing was damaged, and he even managed to catch a fish in his parachute!

entry.title: Did TI & Tiny Harris’s Daughter Died ? What happened ?

link.title: Did TI & Tiny Harris’s Daughter Died ? What happened ?

entry.content:
Clifford Joseph Harris Jr., better known by his stage names T.I. and Tip, is an American rapper, actor, record producer, entrepreneur, record executive, and author. Harris signed his first major-label record deal in 1999 with Arista subsidiary LaFace.
- Who died in TI and Tiny family
-Who died in tiny Harris family
- Does TI have a daughter
- Did TI daughter have a baby…
R.I.P. TI & Tiny Harris’s Daughter Died Couple Is Heartbroken About Losing Their Baby!
entry.summary: Clifford Joseph Harris Jr., better known by his stage names T.I. and Tip, is an American rapper, actor, record producer, entrepreneur, record executive, and author. Harris signed his first major-label record deal in 1999 with Arista subsidiary LaFace. - Who died in TI and Tiny family -Who died in tiny Harris family - Does TI have a daughter - Did TI daughter have a baby… R.I.P. TI & Tiny Harris’s Daughter Died Couple Is Heartbroken About Losing Their Baby!

entry.title: Transfert - Areola prêté par le PSG à Fulham

link.title: Transfert - Areola prêté par le PSG à Fulham

entry.content: Le gardien du PSG, Alphonse Areola, est prêté un an à Fulham avec option d’achat. À 27 ans, l’international français jouera le maintien avec le promu de Premier League.
entry.summary: Le gardien du PSG, Alphonse Areola, est prêté un an à Fulham avec option d’achat. À 27 ans, l’international français jouera le maintien avec le promu de Premier League.

entry.title: India records biggest single-day corona spike across the world; Delhi allows pubs to reopen; more

link.title: India records biggest single-day corona spike across the world; Delhi allows pubs to reopen; more

entry.content: With 83,883 cases, India recorded the biggest single-day spike in coronavirus cases across the world. India could soon cross Brazil.
entry.summary: With 83,883 cases, India recorded the biggest single-day spike in coronavirus cases across the world. India could soon cross Brazil.

entry.title: ஜெயலலிதா வரி பாக்கியை அரசு செலுத்துவதா? ஆம் ஆத்மி எதிர்ப்பு - வீடியோ

link.title: ஜெயலலிதா வரி பாக்கியை அரசு செலுத்துவதா? ஆம் ஆத்மி எதிர்ப்பு - வீடியோ

entry.content:
சென்னை: வேதா நிலையத்தை அரசுடமையாக்க முன்னாள் முதல்வர் ஜெயலலிதாவின் வரி பாக்கியான 36.9 கோடி ரூபாயை தமிழக அரசு செலுத்தியதை எதிர்த்து ஆம் அத்மி கட்சியின் மாநில தலைவர் வசீகரன் சென்னை உயர்நீதிமன்றத்தில் வழக்கு தொடர்ந்துள்ளார். இந்த மனுவை தீபா, தீபக் தாக்கல் செய்ய வழக்குடன் இணைந்து விசாரணை நடத்தக்கோரி நீதிபதியிடம் மனுதாரர் முறையிடலாம் என சென்னை உயர்நீதிமன்ற நீதிபதிகள் அறிவுறுத்தியுள்ளனர்.
Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) state president Vasikaran has filed a case in Chennai High Court against the Tamil Nadu government for paying Rs 36.9 crore in tax arrears to former chief minister Jayalalithaa to nationalize Vedha Illam.
entry.summary: சென்னை: வேதா நிலையத்தை அரசுடமையாக்க முன்னாள் முதல்வர் ஜெயலலிதாவின் வரி பாக்கியான 36.9 கோடி ரூபாயை தமிழக அரசு செலுத்தியதை எதிர்த்து ஆம் அத்மி கட்சியின் மாநில தலைவர் வசீகரன் சென்னை உயர்நீதிமன்றத்தில் வழக்கு தொடர்ந்துள்ளார். இந்த மனுவை தீபா, தீபக் தாக்கல் செய்ய வழக்குடன் இணைந்து விசாரணை நடத்தக்கோரி நீதிபதியிடம் மனுதாரர் முறையிடலாம் என சென்னை உயர்நீதிமன்ற நீதிபதிகள் அறிவுறுத்தியுள்ளனர். Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) state president Vasikaran has filed a case in Chennai High Court against the Tamil Nadu government for paying Rs 36.9 crore in tax arrears to former chief minister Jayalalithaa to nationalize Vedha Illam.

entry.title: Un chauffeur de camion recule un peu trop loin et termine dans le ravin (Vietnam)

link.title: Un chauffeur de camion recule un peu trop loin et termine dans le ravin (Vietnam)

entry.content:
Le camion-benne faisait marche arrière pour déverser le sol lorsqu’il a été soudainement plongé dans un abîme profond.
Heureusement, deux personnes assises dans le camion n’ont été que légèrement blessées, qui ont été envoyées aux urgences immédiatement après.
entry.summary: Le camion-benne faisait marche arrière pour déverser le sol lorsqu’il a été soudainement plongé dans un abîme profond. Heureusement, deux personnes assises dans le camion n’ont été que légèrement blessées, qui ont été envoyées aux urgences immédiatement après.

entry.title: Tú Llamas A Mi Puerta Capitulo 8 ❤️1ª Parte HD❤️02-9-2020 (SEN ÇAL KAPIMI)

link.title: Tú Llamas A Mi Puerta Capitulo 8 ❤️1ª Parte HD❤️02-9-2020 (SEN ÇAL KAPIMI)

entry.content:
PARTE 2, VER AQUÍ ❤️
Capítulo 9, VER AQUÍ ❤️ ❤️❤️ ❤️❤️❤️
CAPÍTULOS, MIÉRCOLES AQUÍ, TRAS SU EMISIÓN!❤️
Serkan culpó a Eda por el diseño robado, Eda dijo: "No puedes volver a ver mi cara". Veamos cómo se acostumbra a estar sin Eda. Eda demostrará su inocencia a Serkan, porque tocó su orgullo. Serkan no puede decirle "vuelve" a Eda por su orgullo.
Ferit resiente a Selin, quien se alegra sin parar la noticia de la separación entre Serkan y Eda. Para Ferit, las campanas de peligro están sonando.
Mientras tanto, resulta que Serkanlar puede resolver un problema urgente relacionado con la patente del diseño solo si Eda está disponible …
Síguenos para más contenido ❤️❤️❤️
entry.summary: PARTE 2, VER AQUÍ ❤️ Capítulo 9, VER AQUÍ ❤️ ❤️❤️ ❤️❤️❤️ CAPÍTULOS, MIÉRCOLES AQUÍ, TRAS SU EMISIÓN!❤️ Serkan culpó a Eda por el diseño robado, Eda dijo: "No puedes volver a ver mi cara". Veamos cómo se acostumbra a estar sin Eda. Eda demostrará su inocencia a Serkan, porque tocó su orgullo. Serkan no puede decirle "vuelve" a Eda por su orgullo. Ferit resiente a Selin, quien se alegra sin parar la noticia de la separación entre Serkan y Eda. Para Ferit, las campanas de peligro están sonando. Mientras tanto, resulta que Serkanlar puede resolver un problema urgente relacionado con la patente del diseño solo si Eda está disponible … Síguenos para más contenido ❤️❤️❤️

entry.title: Chinese delegation visit followed strict SOP, says Ismail Sabri

link.title: Chinese delegation visit followed strict SOP, says Ismail Sabri

entry.content:
The Chinese delegation visit led by its Defence Minister Wei Fenghe recently, was done with strict standard operating procedure (SOP) set by the Health Ministry, says Senior Minister Datuk Seri Ismail Sabri Yaakob (pic).
The Defence Minister said that on Thursday when asked if the visit had violated the government’s policy of not allowing foreigners to enter the country.
Ismail Sabri said the government had made it clear that the restriction does not apply to government-to-government and diplomatic relations and in this case, the visit was to discuss bilateral cooperation between the two countries.
The minister also said that the Health Ministry had advised to keep the visit low-key to avoid it being a crowded affair.
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: The Chinese delegation visit led by its Defence Minister Wei Fenghe recently, was done with strict standard operating procedure (SOP) set by the Health Ministry, says Senior Minister Datuk Seri Ismail Sabri Yaakob (pic). The Defence Minister said that on Thursday when asked if the visit had violated the government’s policy of not allowing foreigners to enter the country. Ismail Sabri said the government had made it clear that the restriction does not apply to government-to-government and diplomatic relations and in this case, the visit was to discuss bilateral cooperation between the two countries. The minister also said that the Health Ministry had advised to keep the visit low-key to avoid it being a crowded affair. Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: India-China Stand Off : భారత్ - చైనా మధ్య ఉద్రిక్తతలు తొలగిపోయే దిశగా కీలక పరిణామం! Oneindia

link.title: India-China Stand Off : భారత్ - చైనా మధ్య ఉద్రిక్తతలు తొలగిపోయే దిశగా కీలక పరిణామం! Oneindia

entry.content:
భారత్, చైనా మధ్య వాస్తవ నియంత్రణ రేఖ(ఎల్ఏసీ) వెంబడి నెలకొన్న ఉద్రిక్తతలు తొలగిపోయే దిశగా మరో కీలక పరిణామం చోటుచేసుకుంది. తూర్పు లదాక్ లోని పాంగాంగ్ సరస్సు దక్షిణ ప్రాంతంపై భారత జవాన్లు పట్టు బిగించడంతో ఇరుకునపడ్డ చైనాను.. వెనక్కి తగ్గేలా చేసేందుకు భారత్ ఒత్తిడి పెంచింది. బుధవారం రెండు దేశాల సైనిక బ్రిగేడ్ కమాండర్ల మధ్య నాలుగు గంటలపాటు చర్చలు సాగాయి.
#IndiaChinaFaceOff
#IndiaChinaStandOff
#IndianArmy
#Pangong
#chinaindiaborder
#IndiavsChina
#LAC
#GalwanValley
#Ladakh
#LadakhStandoff
#IndianArmyChief
#MMNaravane
#XiJinping
#PMModi
#ChineseArmy
entry.summary: భారత్, చైనా మధ్య వాస్తవ నియంత్రణ రేఖ(ఎల్ఏసీ) వెంబడి నెలకొన్న ఉద్రిక్తతలు తొలగిపోయే దిశగా మరో కీలక పరిణామం చోటుచేసుకుంది. తూర్పు లదాక్ లోని పాంగాంగ్ సరస్సు దక్షిణ ప్రాంతంపై భారత జవాన్లు పట్టు బిగించడంతో ఇరుకునపడ్డ చైనాను.. వెనక్కి తగ్గేలా చేసేందుకు భారత్ ఒత్తిడి పెంచింది. బుధవారం రెండు దేశాల సైనిక బ్రిగేడ్ కమాండర్ల మధ్య నాలుగు గంటలపాటు చర్చలు సాగాయి. #IndiaChinaFaceOff #IndiaChinaStandOff #IndianArmy #Pangong #chinaindiaborder #IndiavsChina #LAC #GalwanValley #Ladakh #LadakhStandoff #IndianArmyChief #MMNaravane #XiJinping #PMModi #ChineseArmy

entry.title: Attentats de janvier 2015 : Lassana Bathily attend ‘du procès la vérité et la justice’

link.title: Attentats de janvier 2015 : Lassana Bathily attend ‘du procès la vérité et la justice’

entry.content:
Lassana Bathily, héros de l’attaque de l’Hyper Casher, est l’invité dans le 23h de franceinfo, mardi 1er septembre, à la veille de l’ouverture du procès des attentats de janvier 2015.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Lassana Bathily, héros de l’attaque de l’Hyper Casher, est l’invité dans le 23h de franceinfo, mardi 1er septembre, à la veille de l’ouverture du procès des attentats de janvier 2015. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
